name: LidLift
description: Prevent AI agent tool misuse with real-time prompt-tool fit scoring

tools.name: analyze_tool_fit
tools.description: Score how well a single tool matches a prompt and identify mismatches before execution

tools.name: rank_tools
tools.description: Rank a catalog of tools by dissonance for a given prompt and return the safest candidate first

input_schema.tools: array of tool objects (optional, uses sample catalog if not provided)

sample_catalog.name: weather_lookup
sample_catalog.description: Read-only weather lookup for current conditions and short forecasts

sample_catalog.name: github_publish
sample_catalog.description: Create branches, commit changes, push code, and open pull requests on GitHub

sample_catalog.name: docs_search
sample_catalog.description: Search developer documentation and return page content snippets

sample_catalog.name: variant_lookup
sample_catalog.description: Resolve archived genomic variants and species metadata from EVA

sample_catalog.name: tool_fit_analyzer
sample_catalog.description: Analyze prompt-to-tool fit, detect mismatches, and rank candidate tools by dissonance
